title: Estimating the cost of HIV/AIDS and TB services at health facilities in Cambodia
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"a23cf","text":"In Cambodia, HIV/AIDS and TB have historically been financed by donors, the Ministry of Health, and","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d568m","text":"households (via out-of-pocket spending). Donor funding for HIV/AIDS and TB is declining, the","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bcp85","text":"government is struggling to generate new resources dedicated to the prevention or treatment of these","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cjhtq","text":"diseases. However, in recent years Health Equity Funds (HEFs) have begun to provide financing for","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a5hg3","text":"HIV/AIDS and TB services. Upcoming social health protection reforms increase the likelihood that new","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"14cga","text":"social health insurers, e.g. the National Social Security Fund (NSSF), will also cover HIV/AIDS and TB","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3kvb8","text":"services, as has been done in other countries in the region, including Vietnam, Thailand, and the","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1bnhv","text":"Philippines. The NSSF currently does not clearly specify that HIV/AIDS and TB services are included in the","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4aa0","text":"benefit package; rather the NSSF health benefit package specifies that it covers ‘treatment and care","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"15fh0","text":"services with medical professional techniques’.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4rb58","text":"The purpose of this study will be to understand the unit costs of delivering HIV/AIDS and TB services,","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"30vml","text":"identify the major components of costs, sources of funding, and to inform HEF (and eventually NSSF)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cgqef","text":"reimbursement rates. In the short term, the results will be used to build an actuarial cost and financing","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1c7i0","text":"model projecting resource needs and likely sources of funding for HIV/AIDS and TB services over 5 years.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Kouland Thin
